1.name: Consecrate the Grove
1.description: [1] : Awaken the plant life in your territory to be your defense
references: Vampire: The Masquerade 20th Anniversary Edition Pg. 461

1.name: Consecrate the Grove [1]
1.description: Awaken the plant life in your territory to be your defense

2.name: Crimson Woad
2.description: [3] : Inscribe runes on yourself that give you gain some control over the Beast and add its fury to your attacks
references: Vampire: The Masquerade 20th Anniversary Edition Pg. 462

2.name: Crimson Woad [3]
2.description: Inscribe runes on yourself that give you gain some control over the Beast and add its fury to your attacks

2.name: Woad of Teutates (V20DA)
2.description: [4] : Inscribe runes on sacrifice's body that invoke spirite of war and turn you into furious warrior.
references: Vampire Twentieth Anniversary Edition: The Dark Ages Pg. 232

2.name: Woad of Teutates (V20DA) [4]
2.description: Inscribe runes on sacrifice's body that invoke spirite of war and turn you into furious warrior.

3.name: Inscribe the Curse
3.description: [5] : Write a rune of your enemy's name on your body that curses them when they see it
references: Vampire: The Masquerade 20th Anniversary Edition Pg. 462

3.name: Inscribe the Curse [5]
3.description: Write a rune of your enemy's name on your body that curses them when they see it

3.name: Mhallacht of the Cyoeraeth (V20DA)
3.description: [6] : Write a rune of your enemy's name on body of her mortal friend or close relative that curses them when they see it.
references: Vampire Twentieth Anniversary Edition: The Dark Ages Pg. 233

3.name: Mhallacht of the Cyoeraeth (V20DA) [6]
3.description: Write a rune of your enemy's name on body of her mortal friend or close relative that curses them when they see it.

4.name: Moon and Sun
4.description: [7] : Bind yourself to the spirit of the moon and sun, providing several possible benefits
references: Vampire: The Masquerade 20th Anniversary Edition Pg. 462

4.name: Moon and Sun [7]
4.description: Bind yourself to the spirit of the moon and sun, providing several possible benefits

4.name: Woad of Taranis (V20DA)
4.description: [8] : Write a rune on your chest to become immune to Rötschreck and alter all fire and sun damage to lethal.
references: Vampire Twentieth Anniversary Edition: The Dark Ages Pg. 233

4.name: Woad of Taranis (V20DA) [8]
4.description: Write a rune on your chest to become immune to Rötschreck and alter all fire and sun damage to lethal.

5.name: Drink Dry the Earth
5.description: [9] : Gain temporary power from a site of mystical energy
references: Vampire: The Masquerade 20th Anniversary Edition Pg. 463

5.name: Drink Dry the Earth [9]
5.description: Gain temporary power from a site of mystical energy

5.name: Thirst of Donn (V20DA)
5.description: [10] : Receive temporary will power and blood by absorbing the energy of the earth through the sacrifice of the mortal. Having ritual in the "special" places you will receive a Spirit Mentor.
references: Vampire Twentieth Anniversary Edition: The Dark Ages Pg. 234

5.name: Thirst of Donn (V20DA) [10]
5.description: Receive temporary will power and blood by absorbing the energy of the earth through the sacrifice of the mortal. Having ritual in the "special" places you will receive a Spirit Mentor.

6.name: Inscribe the Forgotten Names
6.description: [11] : Summon and communicate with a mythical creature
references: Vampire: The Masquerade 20th Anniversary Edition Pg. 463

6.name: Inscribe the Forgotten Names [11]
6.description: Summon and communicate with a mythical creature
